name: Meringue Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Line baking sheet with parchment paper; set aside.
2. In a medium bowl, use an electric mixer on medium speed to beat egg whites until frothy. Add cream of tartar and salt, then beat on high speed until stiff peaks form. Beat in sugar one tablespoon at a time. Add vanilla extract; gently fold in chocolate chips.
3. Drop batter by heaping teaspoonfuls onto the prepared baking sheet. Place in oven. Turn off the oven; leave cookies in the oven for 5 hours. Variation: Add food coloring for a festive holiday touch: green for Christmas; pink and yellow for Easter, etc.
